title: APOD Entry
description: A single Astronomy Picture of the Day entry returned by the NASA APOD API

date.description: Date of the APOD entry in YYYY-MM-DD format

title.description: The title of the astronomy image or video
title.example: Filaments of the Vela Supernova Remnant

explanation.description: Detailed explanation of the astronomy picture or video written by NASA scientists

url.description: The URL of the APOD image or video of the day

hdurl.description: The URL for any high-resolution image. Omitted if it does not exist originally at APOD or if media_type is video.

service_version.description: The service version used to fulfill the request

copyright.description: The name of the copyright holder. Absent if the image is NASA/public domain.

concepts.description: An ordered dictionary of concepts derived from the APOD explanation text. Only returned when concept_tags=True.

oneOf.description: String message returned when concept tagging is disabled

thumbnail_url.description: The URL of the video thumbnail. Only present when thumbs=True and media_type is 'video'.

resource.description: A dictionary describing the image_set or planet that the response illustrates

concept_tags.description: Reflection of the supplied concept_tags option. Included in response because of default values.

examples.title: Filaments of the Vela Supernova Remnant
examples.explanation: The explosion is over but the consequences continue.
